name: CBRE Unified Asset Intelligence Platform
description: Build a full-stack commercial real estate intelligence dashboard for CBRE. The platform has 5 screens: (1) Portfolio Overview — shows total properties, occupancy rate, NOI, cap rate, and asset value across Office, Retail, and Industrial property types. (2) Predictive Lease Risk Engine — AI-scored tenant table with risk levels (High/Medium/Low), lease expiry countdown, and broker action recommendations. (3) ESG & Carbon Tracker — monthly CO2 emissions chart per building with a 2030 net-zero target line and energy intensity KPIs. (4) Tenant Experience Hub — space utilization heatmap, satisfaction scores, and open maintenance tickets. (5) AI Deal Assistant — chat panel powered by Claude where users ask questions about properties and get instant insights. Data sources: RentCast API (property records, rental estimates, US commercial market data), EIA CBECS dataset (commercial building energy consumption CSV), US Census ACS API (neighborhood demographics), Kaggle Commercial Occupancy Dataset CSV (room-level occupancy sensor data). All data stored in PostgreSQL. A Python ETL scheduler pulls RentCast API every hour to simulate real-time updates. Use React 18 + TypeScript + Recharts, FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL with SQLAlchemy + Alembic, dark mode, CBRE brand color #006A4D.
